title: Osmania University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Osmania University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Osmania University has officially declared the D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed, and M.P.Ed Results 2026 for the 2025-2026 academic session. Students can check their result status online through the official Osmania University examination portal at osmania.ac.in.

content.text: Osmania University has officially released the Osmania University Exam Result 2026 for D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed and M.P.Ed examinations conducted during the January and February 2026 session. The latest update includes D.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV) Results, B.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV) Results and M.P.Ed 3-Sem (Regular) 1,2-Sem (Backlog) Feb-2026 Results published online for physical education students. Osmania University Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - osmania.ac.in.

Students can check and download their OU D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed and M.P.Ed results by visiting the examination results page, opening the relevant course link and entering their 12 digit hall ticket number to view the marks memo. After accessing the result, candidates are advised to carefully verify their hall ticket number, name, subject wise marks and overall result status, and contact the Osmania University examination branch or their college in case of any discrepancies.

Osmania University has published fresh OU Results 2026 for the Faculty of Physical Education, covering D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed and M.P.Ed semester examinations and revaluation results. The D.P.Ed and B.P.Ed 1st and 3rd Semester Regular January 2026 Revaluation results provide updated marks for candidates who applied for RV, while the M.P.Ed 3rd Sem Regular and 1st, 2nd Sem Backlog February 2026 results declare regular and backlog performance. All these Osmania University results are available online on the examination-results portal where students can log in with their hall ticket number and download the provisional marks memo for reference.

rows: Osmania University Exam Result 2026 Out - D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed, M.P.Ed Semester Results
D.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV), B.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV), M.P.Ed 3-Sem (Regular) 1,2-Sem (Backlog) Feb-2026 Results
D.P.Ed 1st & 3rd Sem (RV), B.P.Ed 1st & 3rd Sem (RV), M.P.Ed 3rd Sem Regular and 1st & 2nd Sem Backlog
Online - individual result pages (res07) with hall ticket based login

content.text: Osmania University has activated direct online links for D.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV), B.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV) and M.P.Ed 3-Sem (Regular) 1,2-Sem (Backlog) Feb-2026 results on its examination-results portal. These OU Result 2026 direct links allow physical education students to instantly open their course wise result pages and view their updated marks without navigating through multiple menus. By using the result links given below, candidates can go to the official OU res07 pages and download their D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed and M.P.Ed semester results by entering their 12 digit hall ticket numbers.

links.label: Osmania University Examination Results Page (All Courses)

sections.heading: Steps to Check Osmania University Exam Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check Osmania University Exam Result 2026 for D.P.Ed, B.P.Ed and M.P.Ed courses online.

items: Visit the official Osmania University website at osmania.ac.in.
On the homepage, click on the Examination Results link or directly open osmania.ac.in/examination-results.php.
On the Examination Results page, locate the links for D.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV), B.P.Ed Sem-1,3 (Regular) Jan-2026 (RV) and M.P.Ed 3-Sem (Regular) 1,2-Sem (Backlog) Feb-2026.
Click on the relevant result link for your course, which will open a new res07 result page.
On the result page, enter your 12 digit hall ticket number in the space provided (for example, 164424716016, as shown in the instructions).
Submit the details to view your Osmania University result, which will display your name, hall ticket number, subject wise marks and overall result status.
Download or print the provisional marks memo and keep it safe until the original marks sheets are issued by the university or college.

If you find any discrepancy in your marks or personal details, contact your college or the OU examination branch and follow the notified process for clarification, revaluation or photocopy of answer scripts.

structured_links.label: Osmania University Examination Results Page (All Courses)
